name: Carbonara con Pancetta
method: In a large bowl, whisk together eggs and cheese, set aside. Boil a large pot of salted water. In the meantime, in a large frying pan on medium heat, add 1 T of olive oil,1 T butter, and fry pancetta until crispy. Turn off heat. When water is boiling add spaghetti and cook until al dente. Add directly to the frying pan with the cooked pancetta. Add 1 cup of hot pasta water and put the egg mixture directly on top. Mix quickly and manticare a couple of times. Turn onto plates, add parmesan and black pepper to garnish. Serving suggestion: fresh salad and homemade bread. Serves 2. Olé
